name: GER40_M15_DonchianTrendPullback_v1
hypothesis: On GER40 M15, trading EMA-aligned pullbacks to the 20-EMA after a fresh 40-bar Donchian breakout yields positive expectancy during European cash hours because DAX exhibits persistent intraday momentum when ADX is elevated.

signals.entry_long: donchian_high(40) broken within last 10 bars AND ema(20) > ema(50) AND price pulls back to within 0.3*ATR of ema(20) AND close > ema(20)
signals.entry_short: donchian_low(40) broken within last 10 bars AND ema(20) < ema(50) AND price pulls back to within 0.3*ATR of ema(20) AND close < ema(20)

exits.trailing: chandelier exit 3.0*ATR from highest close since entry, activated at +1.5*ATR
